title: BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: BigBear.ai is scheduled to announce Q3 2024 results on November 5, 2024. Analysts anticipate revenue of approximately $46.03 million with earnings of -$0.07 per share for the quarter. For the full year 2024, projections stand at $175.42 million in revenue and -$0.77 earnings per share. Looking ahead to 2025, estimates suggest $203.35 million in revenue with -$0.19 per share in earnings. During the prior quarter (June 30, 2024), the company's actual revenue came in at $39.78 million, falling short of the $46.548 million expectation by approximately 14.5%. However, earnings per share of -$0.05 exceeded the -$0.07 forecast. Following those results, the stock declined roughly 4.3% in a single trading session. The consensus recommendation from five brokerage firms rates BBAI as Outperform. Analyst price targets average $2.63, suggesting potential upside of 66.14% from the current $1.58 price point, though estimates range from $1.50 to $3.50.
